# AdSlack

> AdSlack is an AI-powered ad intelligence SaaS platform that helps digital marketers, media buyers, and creative agencies discover winning advertising creatives before their competitors. Core capabilities: real-time velocity scoring, AI creative deconstruction (Anthropic Claude), one-click creative brief generation, and cross-platform ad discovery across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, Google Ads, Pinterest, and Snapchat.

## What AdSlack Does

AdSlack tracks advertising creatives across six major ad platforms and scores them using a proprietary velocity metric (0–100, updated every 30 minutes). The platform surfaces ads gaining the most momentum in real-time, enabling users to identify breakout creatives within 48 hours of launch — before they become mainstream and lose their competitive edge.

## Core Features

- **Velocity Scoring**: Real-time 0–100 score measuring ad momentum across 50+ niches. Updated every 30 minutes. Scores of 70+ indicate high growth; 90+ is exceptional for a niche.
- **AI X-Ray Analysis**: Powered by Anthropic Claude. Deconstructs any ad's hook structure, emotional triggers, CTA mechanics, scroll-stop techniques, and persuasion psychology. Explains exactly why an ad is performing well.
- **Ad Discovery Engine**: 2M+ ad database searchable by niche, platform, velocity tier, days running, brand name, and keyword (across hooks, captions, and video transcripts).
- **Brief Generator**: One-click creative brief from any winning ad. Output includes hook strategy, scene-by-scene breakdown, copy angles, emotion triggers, music direction, platform specs, and targeting recommendations — ready to hand to a video editor or UGC creator.
- **Velocity Alerts**: Real-time email notifications when ads exceed velocity thresholds in selected niches. Configurable by category, platform, and score threshold.
- **Trend Forecasting**: Identifies emerging trends 2–3 weeks ahead using velocity pattern analysis.
- **Hook & Script Remix**: AI rewrites any ad's hook or full script in multiple angles for A/B testing.
- **Saturation Detection**: Tracks ad duplication and market saturation scores to identify oversaturated niches.

## Supported Platforms

TikTok, Meta (Facebook & Instagram), YouTube, Google Ads, Pinterest, Snapchat

## Data Freshness

- Velocity scores updated every 30 minutes
- Ads ingested from official sources (Meta Ad Library, TikTok Creative Center, YouTube) plus proprietary crawlers
- Database: 2M+ ads across 50+ niches

## Pricing (USD/month, billed monthly)

| Plan   | Price | Key Limits |
|--------|-------|------------|
| Free   | $0    | 10 ad searches/day, basic previews, no AI features, no credit card required |
| Pro    | $59   | Unlimited searches, 50 AI credits/month, AI X-Ray, brief generator, 5 velocity alerts |
| Scale  | $149  | Unlimited AI credits, 20 velocity alerts, bulk CSV + brief export, 5 team seats |
| Agency | $299  | Unlimited everything, 50 velocity alerts, 15 seats, white-label reports |

AI credits reset monthly on billing cycle date. 1 credit = 1 AI-powered action (X-Ray breakdown, brief generation, hook remix, or script generation).

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How does AdSlack differ from AdSpy, PiPiAds, BigSpy, or Minea?**
AdSlack refreshes velocity data every 30 minutes vs. competitors' 24–48 hour lag. AdSlack adds AI-powered creative deconstruction (X-Ray) and production-ready brief generation that competitors lack entirely. Pro plan starts at $59/month — cheaper than PiPiAds at $77/month.

**What AI model powers the analysis?**
All AI features are powered by Anthropic Claude. Claude Opus handles detailed anatomy breakdowns; Claude Sonnet handles faster remix generation.

**What is velocity scoring?**
A proprietary 0–100 metric measuring how fast an ad is gaining engagement momentum relative to its age and platform baseline. Updated every 30 minutes. Velocity measures current momentum — unlike "most viewed" or "most spent" metrics which measure historical totals.

**Is there a free trial?**
Yes. The Free plan provides 10 ad searches per day with no credit card required. AI-powered features (X-Ray, briefs, alerts) require a Pro plan or higher.

**How do AI credits work?**
Each AI-powered action costs 1 credit. Pro plans include 50 credits/month. Scale and Agency plans have unlimited credits. Credits reset on the billing cycle date.

**Do you cover TikTok, Meta, and YouTube?**
Yes — all four major platforms are fully supported. Velocity scores are calibrated per-platform so scores are comparable within each platform's context.

## Target Users

- Digital marketers and media buyers running paid advertising
- E-commerce and DTC brands tracking competitor ad strategies
- Creative agencies building ad pipelines
- UGC creators and freelance media buyers
- Marketing teams needing competitive intelligence and creative inspiration

AdSlack is a SaaS company building AI-powered ad intelligence tools.
Website: https://adslack.com

## Blog Content

The AdSlack blog at https://adslack.com/blog covers ad intelligence strategy, creative analysis frameworks, platform-specific guides, and competitive tool comparisons. All content is written for digital marketing professionals.

## Content Policy for AI Crawlers

All content on adslack.com/blog, adslack.com/tools, adslack.com/vs, and the homepage is publicly accessible and may be indexed by AI search engines. Dashboard routes (/discover, /saved, /alerts, /admin) require authentication and should not be indexed.
